title: 25Pcs Lilac Artificial Roses, Real Touch Foam Roses with Stems, 4 Leaves, Artificial Flowers for Wedding, Bridal Bouquets, Cake, Grave Stone, Table Centerpieces, Baby Shower, Funeral Decoration
features: Quantity: You will receive 25 PCS artificial foam roses and 4 rose leaves
Size: The diameter of our single rose is 8cm, and the length of the root and stem is 18cm

Material: These artificial roses are made of high-quality soft latex foam It's durable, No smelly, No fade, No misshapen, No spotted and the color of the flowers are vivid and uniform, look and feel like real roses
Usage occasion: Perfect for Valentine's Day, bridal showers, parties, baby showers, or home decor, making bouquets, centerpieces, kissing balls, corsage, cake decorations, or any flower arrangement

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Interior home decor, outdoor decor for covered spaces, staging for events or photography
